intro: Joelah (meaning: lifting up; profiting; taking away slander) was one of the Benjamite warriors who joined David at Ziklag while David was still restricted in his movements because of Saul. He was a son of Jeroham of Gedor and is listed among the ambidextrous bowmen and slingers who came to David's support before his accession to the throne.
hitchcock_meaning: lifting up; profiting; taking away slander
